query: SELECT p.id as project_id, p.name as project_name, cpa.clientId, c.name as client_name, cu.role FROM projects p LEFT JOIN client_project_assignments cpa ON p.id = cpa.projectId LEFT JOIN clients c ON cpa.clientId = c.id LEFT JOIN client_users cu ON c.id = cu.clientId AND cu.userId = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'tbechtol@forneytx.gov') WHERE p.name LIKE '%PDF%' LIMIT 1;
